message:
🌱 Add emissary-ingress: Emissary sends gzip encoded payloads to backend services mission (#1327)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "emissary-ingress-3818-emissary-sends-gzip-encoded-payloads-to-backend-services",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "emissary-ingress: Emissary sends gzip encoded payloads to backend services",
+    "description": "Emissary sends gzip encoded payloads to backend services. This issue affects 10+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify emissary-ingress troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your emissary-ingress deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n emissary-ingress -l app.kubernetes.io/name=emissary-ingress\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=emissary-ingress -n emissary-ingress --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review emissary-ingress configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant emissary-ingress configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n emissary-ingress -l app.kubernetes.io/name=emissary-ingress\nkubectl get configmap -n emissary-ingress -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=emissary-ingress\n```\n### Describe the bug\nIf we send certain payloads to Emissary, Emissary seems to be gzip encoding the payload and forwarding it to the upstream service."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Emissary sends gzip encoded payloads to backend services",
+        "description": "Fixes a bug introduced in `1.14.0` where upstream services would receive g\n```yaml\n---\napiVersion: getambassador.io/v2\nkind: Module\nmetadata:\n  name: ambassador\n  namespace: ambassador\nspec:\n  ambassador_id: gzip-test\n  config:\n    gzip:\n      enabled: true\n    use_remote_address: true\n    xff_num_trusted_hops: 1\n    server_name: \"gzip-test\"\n[ ... ]\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Emissary sends gzip encoded payloads to backend… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=emissary-ingress -n emissary-ingress --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n emissary-ingress --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Fixes a bug introduced in `1.14.0` where upstream services would receive g",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "---\napiVersion: getambassador.io/v2\nkind: Module\nmetadata:\n  name: ambassador\n  namespace: ambassador\nspec:\n  ambassador_id: gzip-test\n  config:\n    gzip:\n      enabled: true\n    use_remote_address: true\n    xff_num_trusted_hops: 1\n    server_name: \"gzip-test\"\n[ ... ]",
+        "curl -i -vv -X POST curl --silent -o /dev/null https://my-ingress.example.com -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" -d '{\"foo\":\"bar\"}'",
+        "{\n  body: '{\"foo\":\"bar\"}',\n  headers: Headers {\n    accept: \"*/*\",\n    \"content-type\": \"application/json\",\n  },\n  [ ... ]\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "emissary-ingress",
+      "incubating",
+      "networking",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "emissary-ingress"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Ingress",
+      "Namespace",
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/emissary-ingress/emissary/issues/3818",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/emissary-ingress/emissary",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/emissary-ingress/emissary/pull/3967"
+    },
+    "reactions": 10,
+    "comments": 8,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with emissary-ingress installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-17T06:29:00.762Z",

+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
